component.name: wallet-core
component.description: Facade: owns the Event/Effect enums, the sans-IO run loop, and the UniFFI-exposed API.

components.name: catalogue
components.description: Attestation catalogue (TS11): the credential types the wallet knows — claims, formats, trusted issuers — with matching logic. Sans-IO, pure.

components.name: cose
components.description: COSE_Sign1 / COSE_Mac0 / COSE_Key (RFC 9052/9053) over crypto-traits.

components.name: crypto-backend
components.description: aws-lc-rs implementation of the crypto-traits boundary (verify/digest/kdf/aead/random) + a software signer for tests/issuers.

components.name: crypto-traits
components.description: Cryptographic trait boundary — the core depends only on these, never on a concrete crypto impl.

components.name: iso18013-5
components.description: ISO/IEC 18013-5 proximity: device engagement + session, sans-IO (opaque transport bytes).

components.name: mdoc
components.description: Deterministic/canonical CBOR + ISO/IEC 18013-5 mdoc structures.

components.name: oid4vci
components.description: OpenID4VCI 1.0 issuance — sans-IO, HAIP-only flows.

components.name: oid4vp
components.description: OpenID4VP 1.0 remote presentation — sans-IO, HAIP-constrained state machine.

components.name: payment
components.description: PSD2/TS12 payment Strong Customer Authentication with dynamic linking (sans-IO).

components.name: presenter
components.description: Snapshot -> canonical, hashable ScreenDescription (A2UI pattern) + consent minimization.

components.name: qes
components.description: Qualified/advanced e-signature (QES) authorization flow — sans-IO. Binds the signature to what the user saw (consent hash) and the document (DTBS/R). Remote QTSP/QSCD I/O is the shell's.

components.name: sdjwt
components.description: SD-JWT VC (draft-17) + JOSE/JWS over crypto-traits.

components.name: status
components.description: Token Status List (draft-21) + certificate status, with deterministic fail policy.

components.name: trust
components.description: Trusted lists (ETSI 119 612/119 602) and trust anchors — parsing pure, fetch is an effect.

components.name: txnlog
components.description: Privacy-preserving, tamper-evident transaction (audit) log for the wallet (TS06). Sans-IO.

components.name: w2w
components.description: Wallet-to-wallet credential transfer (TS09): receiver accept-after-validate machine + sender consent-bound transfer binding. Sans-IO.

components.name: wua
components.description: Wallet Unit Attestation + key attestation (TS03) over platform attestation.

components.name: x509
components.description: Certificate parsing, path validation profile, and EUDI relying-party profile checks.
